name: neus-trust
description: Stop agents from acting blind. Verified identity, limited permissions, and reusable trust receipts — one setup for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, and VS Code.

interface.shortDescription: Verify identity and permissions before agents act.
interface.longDescription: Stop agents from acting blind. Verified identity, limited permissions, and reusable trust receipts — one setup for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, and VS Code.
defaultPrompt: Use NEUS to check identity and permissions before taking action.
Use NEUS to check trust receipts for this wallet or organization.
